ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hbase_tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HBase table */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the HBase table */,
  "max_versions" INTEGER /* Maximum number of versions to retain for each cell */,
  "compression" TEXT /* Compression type used for the table (e.g., NONE, GZ, LZO) */,
  "in_memory" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the table should be kept in memory */,
  "bloom_filter_type" TEXT /* Type of bloom filter to use (e.g., NONE, ROW, ROWCOL) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the table configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the table configuration was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the HBase table */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the table */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the table */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the table configuration */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the data stored in the table */,
  "read_requests" INTEGER /* Number of read requests to the table */,
  "write_requests" INTEGER /* Number of write requests to the table */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hbase_tables_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hbase_tables_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data engineer, admin, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing specific permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HBase table being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the table */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the table was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, read, update, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access request */,
  "response_code" INTEGER /* HTTP response code of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES hbase_tables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "table_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HBase table */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* JSON object containing the configuration settings */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_table_versions_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES hbase_tables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_table_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
